title: Fish Tacos
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Mexican dish featuring fish, noodles, and a variety of flavors. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: To season the fish and noodles

instructions: 1. Cut the fish into small pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the olive oil in a pan and fry the fish until it's cooked through.
3. Cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
4. In a separate pan, warm the tortillas over low heat.
5. Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of fish on each tortilla, followed by some noodles and a squeeze of lime juice.
